requests.video_model_prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Master Kong Iced Black Tea. The scene shows a minimalist studio tabletop setup. Use single adult hand with clean, natural skin as the only moving person or hand. A matte dark slate stone slab as. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. Starting from the composed studio scene with the real Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle standing on a matte dark slate stone slab against a seamless matte charcoal gray background, the camera makes a slow, steady push-in under cool, controlled side lighting. After a brief beat, a single right hand with a clean, natural look and the cuff of an off-white linen shirt enters smoothly from frame right. The hand gently grips the bottle at mid-body, lifts it with care, rotates it just enough so the label faces the camera, and tilts it slightly toward the lens as if offering a sip—suggesting a cool, refreshing moment without pouring. The lighting remains calm and refined, catching a soft edge highlight on the bottle. The hand then steadies. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.
requests.planner_visual_prompt: Starting from the composed studio scene with the real Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle standing on a matte dark slate stone slab against a seamless matte charcoal gray background, the camera makes a slow, steady push-in under cool, controlled side lighting. After a brief beat, a single right hand with a clean, natural look and the cuff of an off-white linen shirt enters smoothly from frame right. The hand gently grips the bottle at mid-body, lifts it with care, rotates it just enough so the label faces the camera, and tilts it slightly toward the lens as if offering a sip—suggesting a cool, refreshing moment without pouring. The lighting remains calm and refined, catching a soft edge highlight on the bottle. The hand then steadies the bottle in a centered, label-forward hero hold above the slab as the slow push-in continues. End with the bottle steady and composed, quiet and premium, with no additional props introduced and the same background maintained throughout.
requests.overlay_text: Master Kong Iced Black Tea — Cool and refreshing for hot days.
requests.audio_direction: Light, cool ambient pad; a subtle whoosh as the hand lifts the bottle; a soft chime on the final hero hold. No voiceover.
